arts.ttl: Forest owner gets stadium ban after Fulham tunnel incident. Nuno touchline ban for Brighton red card
arts.sum: Forest manager Nuno Espirito Santo was given a separate punishment on Friday when fined 55,000 pounds ($72,000) and banned from the touchline for two games after being sent off in his team’s 2-2 draw with Brighton last month. The owner of Nottingham Forest was given a five-match stadium ban on Friday in the latest of a series of sanctions against the Premier League club in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: 'It hurt': Howe admits transfer regrets as Newcastle prepare to face former wonderkid
arts.sum: The Newcastle boss admitted having to cash in on Minteh and academy graduate Elliot Anderson ‘hurt’ but insisted the decision was ‘the right thing’ for the club and its finances. Newcastle will host Brighton this weekend knowing that wonderkid Yankuba Minteh will be playing for the visitors instead of his first appearance at St James’ Park coming while wearing black and white.

arts.ttl: Ashworth plan and records broken as Yankuba Minteh makes second Newcastle visit
arts.sum: Despite an abundance of multi-million pound talent on display, all eyes will be on 20-year-old Yankuba Minteh when Newcastle United return to Premier League action this weekend. The rest is history as Newcastle, backed into a corner by the Premier League's controversial profit and sustainability rules [PSR], sold up ahead of time for £33m, subsequently making £26m profit on a player who hadn't kicked a football in black and white.

arts.ttl: England have to do what is right for them - Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe says he was not contacted by the Football Association during their recent hunt for a new England manager.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe: I was not approached by the FA about the England job
arts.sum: Howe had been linked with the vacancy before Thomas Tuchel’s appointment was confirmed on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Team News: Newcastle United vs. Brighton & Hove Albion injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Brighton & Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: The Anthony Gordon gesture that impressed Eddie Howe after England duty
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon returned to training early after England duty this week with Newcastle United chief Eddie Howe confident that he can bury any demons against Brighton & Hove Albion. Lifting the lid on Gordon's decision to come back before he was told, Howe said: "Anthony was one of the players that we got back early and he had two really good days training with us.

arts.ttl: Howe, Ancelotti not contacted by FA; Pep coy on England conversations
arts.sum: Eddie Howe and Carlo Ancelotti have revealed they were not contacted by the FA ahead of Thomas Tuchel's appointment as England manager, while Pep Guardiola refused to say whether he had conversations about the role.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Brighton: Predicted Lineups, Score Prediction and 15/1 Bet Builder
arts.sum: Brighton face Newcastle on Saturday afternoon as the Seagulls look to build upon their 3-2 win over Tottenham prior to the international break. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for t...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United have set a condition to sign Antoine Semenyo from Bournemouth
arts.sum: Mick Brown, the former chief scout of Manchester United and an expert on matters regarding football transfers, has claimed that Newcastle United will only sign Antoine Semenyo from Bournemouth at a price that suits them. The Magpies are looking to strengthen their wide positions after an underwhelming summer transfer window.
